name: Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onions and make rings approximately 1/2 inch in width.
2. Dip each ring into buttermilk, then coat with flour.
3. Dip again into buttermilk, then coat with unsalted cracker meal.
(Using the "wet hand, dry hand" method works best.)
4. Place the rings onto wax paper, separating layers with additional sheets of wax paper.
5. Allow the batter to set overnight in the refrigerator.
6. Deep fry until golden-brown. Salt at serving time if desired.
7. Enjoy!
